title: Framework for compatible PodmanClient
body:
Introduces the library framework for building a compatible higher level
PodmanClient().

New classes introduced in client.py and domain library.

See, podman/tests/unit/test_podmanclient.py and
podman/tests/unit/test_containers.py.

See also, https://docker-py.readthedocs.io/en/stable/index.html

Pods are handled by mimicking classes and methods of the other areas of
concern.

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>
